/usr/bin/cc -fsanitize=address,undefined -fno-omit-frame-pointer -g -O1 -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_fysics.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_fysics.dir/tests/test_fysics.c.o -o test_fysics  libfysics.a -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/15/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
